# ViLexNorm quality audit

Trang thai: placeholder cho audit chat luong truoc khi merge.

## Hang muc audit

- Dedup voi ViSmishDS hien tai.
- Phan phoi do dai.
- Ty le teencode/viet tat/bien the khau ngu.
- Ty le keyword scam-like trong clean candidates.
- Chat luong hard negatives sau review.
- Mau representative theo tung nhom.

## Luu y

ViLexNorm khong phai SMS P2P that. Moi ket qua audit can bao cao rieng theo `source_dataset` va khong tron voi real SMS ground truth.
